title: 品牌徽标设计图
description: A photorealistic selfie of a young man with short wavy dark hair and light stubble on an indoor basketball court. He wears a black athletic t-shirt with a white swoosh. He holds a {argument name="ball color" default="gre
prompt_raw: A photorealistic selfie of a young man with short wavy dark hair and light stubble on an indoor basketball court. He wears a black athletic t-shirt with a white swoosh. He holds a {argument name="ball color" default="green"} basketball featuring a large white {argument name="logo design" default="OpenAI logo"}. The background shows a hardwood floor, black wall pads, and a basketball hoop against a concrete wall. Bright indoor gym lighting with a casual social media aesthetic.
prompt_preview: A photorealistic selfie of a young man with short wavy dark hair and light stubble on an indoor basketball court. He wears a black athletic t-shirt with a white swoosh. He holds a {argument name="ball color" default="gre
prompt_display_cn:
案例「ball color」属于品牌视觉。这是一张品牌视觉/Logo 规范类案例，重点在标志、字体、色彩、图标系统、应用物料和品牌气质的统一呈现。适合改成品牌提案板、Logo 组合规范、视觉识别系统、产品品牌页。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 照片写实 selfie of a young man with short wavy dark hair and 光线 stubble on an indoor basketball court. He wears a black athletic t-shirt with a white swoosh. He holds a 【ball color：green】 basketball featuring a large white 【标志 design：OpenAI 标志】. The 背景 shows a hardwood floor, black wall pads, and a basketball hoop against a concrete wall. Bright indoor gym 光线ing with a casual social media aesthetic.
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【品牌名称】的品牌视觉规范展示板。

品牌定位：
品牌属于【行业/领域】，核心气质是【品牌气质】，目标用户为【目标用户】。

Logo 区域：
展示主 Logo、反白 Logo、横版/竖版组合、图形标识和安全留白规范。Logo 文字为【Logo文字】。

色彩与字体：
展示品牌主色【主色】、辅助色【辅助色】、背景色【背景色】，并展示中文/英文字体规范：【字体风格】。

图标与视觉元素：
设计一组统一风格的品牌图标，用于【应用场景】。加入品牌纹理、辅助图形或视觉符号：【辅助元素】。

应用展示：
展示【应用物料1】、【应用物料2】、【应用物料3】等真实落地场景，例如 App 图标、网页、手机界面、名片、包装、杯子或海报。

整体要求：
版式高级、干净、有品牌提案感，文字清晰，像专业设计公司出品的视觉规范板。
